extraction.one_line_summary: KWIATKOWSKI Michał won stage 5 after Team Sky controlled multiple climbs, taking race lead from teammate Thomas through bonus seconds at finish
tactical_patterns: Cataldo swept three consecutive KOM climbs while solo, suggesting breakaway riders prioritized points over stage win probability.
Sky positioned Thomas on wheel of attacks then Kwiatkowski finished, revealing hierarchical sprint leadout even on punchy stages.
Late Scarponi attack from Astana forced Sky to deploy both GC assets, exposing vulnerability when team has multiple contenders.

rider_signals.CATALDO Dario: positive: Won three consecutive KOM sprints solo from break, showing climbing form superseded stage ambitions
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: neutral: Controlled attacks for teammate but lost race lead via bonus seconds, suggesting Sky prioritized stage over GC
rider_signals.KWIATKOWSKI Michał: positive: Finished behind Thomas in team hierarchy but superior sprint took race lead, tactical flexibility rewarded
rider_signals.SCARPONI Michele: positive: Late attack forced Sky into defensive riding despite numerical advantage, disrupted their sprint preparation
rider_signals.BASSO Fabiano: negative: Three mechanical stops with rear wheel suggests equipment issues or poor team support disrupted rhythm
